title: Vol 11 translation request
wikitext:
[]: Vol 11 translation request             Quote Post by Zeak » Thu Dec 18, 2008 10:18 pm Hay if anybody has the English Vol 11 could that please post up the text spoken from pages 133 to 144. I’m interested to see what is said as the events are different to EOE.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 19, 2008 1:19 pm There's a translation for all the Vol 11 chapters up on Eva Mailing List...Unless you're looking for Viz's "official" translation?
